nodes.label: AI as writing assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI as ghostwriter or content generator
nodes.grounding_span: What I do use AI for is discussing some more technical aspects of writing

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement for human creativity
nodes.grounding_span: I might also use it for brainstorming ideas

nodes.label: AI as comprehensive search tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as transformative force in creative process
nodes.grounding_span: Before I might have googled something and read blog posts or something. Now I'll have a conversation with an AI model

nodes.label: AI-generated fiction quality and depth
nodes.grounding_span: A novel written by AI might have a great plot and be technically brilliant. But it won't have the deeper nuances that only a human can weave

nodes.label: AI manuscript critique for structural issues
nodes.label_negative: Uploading full manuscript to AI due to data privacy concerns
nodes.grounding_span: I would expect to be able to feed it a longer piece of text...and have it critique it

nodes.label: Human emotional depth in storytelling
nodes.grounding_span: the slow burn emotional response a reader might feel from reading a book by an accomplished author

nodes.label: Intellectual property protection
nodes.grounding_span: I don't know how the model will use that material

nodes.label: Firm boundary against AI writing
nodes.grounding_span: I will never use AI for is getting it to write or re-write a section of text for me

nodes.label: Positive view of AI as time-saving sounding board
nodes.grounding_span: What I do use AI for is discussing some more technical aspects of writing

nodes.label: Concern about AI-generated fiction quality
nodes.grounding_span: I'm super concerned about the use of AI to write stories

nodes.label: Ambivalent stance toward AI as editorial checker
nodes.grounding_span: I would find the advice useful, I'm sure. But I'm not sure I'd be comfortable uploading a finished piece

nodes.label: Boundary-driven selective tool use
nodes.grounding_span: there are certain approaches I do/don't want to take

nodes.label: Problem-solving through structured technical discussion
nodes.grounding_span: discussing some more technical aspects of writing
